landing.introduction: With a range of built-in and extensible Modes, Shofer lets you plan, architect, code, debug and boost your productivity like never before.

connect.title: Connect a provider
connect.description: Add your API key so Shofer can reach your model.

prompt.title: Write your first prompt
prompt.description: Describe a task in plain language — Shofer plans, edits, and runs it for you.

learn.title: Learn the ropes
learn.description: Take the guided walkthrough to get the most out of Shofer's modes, tools, and workflows.

providerSignup.useAnotherProviderDescription: Enter an API key and get going.
